problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
